raw_consumer_statement: There was a purchase made on my XXXX credit card for items purchased from XXXX totalling {$630.00}. I contacted XXXX about the problem and they were of no help. I cancelled my account with them. I have contacted XXXX Bank XXXX times regarding this matter and all three times I have been told that due to my past purchases from XXXX, that I was responsible for these charges. All my purchases from XXXX were less than {$50.00}. I have never purchased any items for that amount of money. I looked into it on my own. and I saw that the items were sent to a arabic warehouse in New Hampshire. I notified Barclay of this and also gave them the name and phone number to contact these people. They still denied my fraud claim and state that I am responsible for the amount of {$630.00}. This has been ongoing since XXXX XXXX.
